fragility_points: Single-minute settlement can lose despite broader bullish price action before or after that minute.
Venue-specific basis or Binance operational issues could matter disproportionately.
A fast downside shock can erase the current cushion within days in crypto.
key_assumptions: BTC retains enough buffer above 68k that ordinary volatility does not threaten the exact noon-ET close.
Binance BTC/USDT remains an orderly and representative settlement venue on April 20.
No fresh macro or crypto-specific shock causes an 8-9% downside move into the resolution window.
main_logical_chain: The contract resolves on a narrowly defined Binance BTC/USDT one-minute close at noon ET on April 20.
Current Binance price is materially above 68k, making Yes the base case.
Recent daily closes and cross-exchange references support that BTC is genuinely trading far above the strike right now.
But the market's extreme probability understates single-minute, single-venue, and volatility tail risk.
So the fair probability remains high but below market at roughly 89%.
main_thesis: Yes is still the base case because BTC is currently well above 68k, but the 93.5% market price looks a bit too confident for a single-minute, single-venue Binance settlement several days away.
source_quality_view: Source-of-truth ambiguity is low because Polymarket explicitly names Binance BTC/USDT 1m close at noon ET; evidence quality for current price regime is good after an added cross-exchange verification pass.
strongest_disconfirmers: The contract resolves on one exact Binance one-minute close at 12:00 ET, concentrating timing and venue risk.
BTC daily volatility remains large enough that an 8-9% drawdown by April 20 is plausible.
BTC traded in the high-66k/low-67k area earlier this month, so the strike is not remote in current regime terms.
strongest_supports: Binance BTCUSDT traded around 74.2k-74.3k during the run, about 9% above strike.
Binance daily closes were above 68k on 11 of the last 14 days.
CoinGecko, Coinbase, and CNBC all broadly confirmed the same spot regime in the 74k area.
timing_relevance: Timing is central because the contract is not about general April 20 trading levels; it is about the final close of the exact Binance BTC/USDT 12:00 ET one-minute candle on 2026-04-20.
unresolved_ambiguities: Whether Binance would experience any operational anomaly near the resolution minute.
How much downside event risk exists between now and April 20 noon ET.
what_would_change_view: A sustained move below 72k/70k, accelerating downside volatility, macro risk-off shock, or Binance-specific anomaly would push the estimate lower; continued stable closes above 72k-73k into April 18-19 would move it closer to market.
